---
name: 💡 Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature for Nexus AI Studio
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## 💡 Feature Description

A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see.

## 🎯 Problem Statement

What problem does this feature solve? Is your feature request related to a frustration?

## 🔧 Proposed Solution

Describe how you'd like this feature to work.

## 🔄 Alternatives Considered

Any alternative solutions or features you've considered?

## 📊 Use Case

Describe a specific use case where this feature would be valuable.

## 📸 Mockups / References

If applicable, add mockups, screenshots, or links to similar implementations.

## 💡 Additional Context

Add any other context about the feature request here.
